Blackstone-backed Knowledge Realty Trust raises Rs 500 cr through issue of commercial papers
india_trends.summary: Knowledge Realty Trust (KRT), India's largest REIT, has successfully raised Rs 500 crore through commercial paper issuance. This private placement will fund KRT's expansion plans. The 91-day commercial papers, set to mature on August 11, 2026, will be listed on the BSE's wholesale debt market.

india_trends.title: Sensex at 89,000: What makes Morgan Stanley bullish on Indian stock market despite earnings risks, oil shock?
india_trends.summary: Sectorally, Morgan Stanley is betting on domestic cyclicals over defensive and external-facing sectors, as key risks to India are mostly external, including geopolitical tensions and slowing global growth, it observed.

india_trends.title: Top Gainers & Losers on May 13: SAIL, Dixon Tech, Vodafone Idea, HPCL, Berger Paints, Ather Energy among top gainers
india_trends.summary: After four sessions of declines, Indian markets rebounded on May 13, led by gains in metal stocks. The Nifty 50 and Sensex rose slightly, while broader indices outperformed. Government tariff hikes on precious metals and rising tensions in the Middle East influenced market dynamics.
